intro: Metathelypteris singalanensis, also known as Singalan fern, is a species of plant in the family Thelypteridaceae, a type of fern characterized by its delicate fronds and creeping rhizome. The Singalan fern has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and is said to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the treatment of various diseases such as arthritis and certain types of cancer. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which have been found to have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
